vulnerability.reference: Absence of provenance/disclosure labels on AI-generated captions leads users to trust and share false identifications.
vulnerability.generated: Users rely on automated captions as accurate and cannot detect imperceptible adversarial image perturbations.

impact.reference: Proliferation of mislabeled political images causes public confusion, reputational harm, and eroded trust in information.
impact.generated: False labels and misinformation spread rapidly, eroding trust in media and damaging reputations of misidentified political figures.

dose_response.reference: Adversarial images cause VLM to mislabel political figures, which in social media auto-captioning exposes users to false identifications, leading to public confusion and reputational harm.
dose_response.generated: Adversarial image hijacks inducing false statements and safety override, through social media users exposed to auto-captioned images, trigger reliance on imperceptible perturbations as accurate, leading to rapid misinformation, eroded trust, and reputational damage.
